entry.title: Posting with trans. type [..] not possible as an acquis. was not yet posted
entry.content:
While uploading legacy asset with value through LTMC error"Posting with trans. type [..] not possible as an acquis. was not yet posted".

As per the template their is one template combine for legacy asset master creation and uploading the value.

Please suggest how to proceed. 

Attaching the template for reference.

LTMC project name - Akums_Asset_Final

entry.title: Message no. KD031 : Receiver categ. PSG is not allowed by settlement prof. ZIO004 for this sender
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to create a sales order but getting below error, 

Receiver categ. PSG is not allowed by settlement prof. ZIO004 for this sender

Please refer attached documentation for your reference.

Best Regards,

Praveen R

entry.title: User is not able to post the depreciation due to missing cost center in Asset master data.
entry.content:
User is not able to post the depreciation due to missing cost center in Asset master data 30000708 & 30000710.

in C01 /100 system, for company code 3806 Could you check and let us know you advise on this.

we have similar issue in C02/100 as well 30000667

Thank you

entry.title: Depreciation posting not completed due to missing Cost center in Asset Master
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Issue details: User created Asset with out Cost center. And posted acquisition And performed depreciation run Asset got posted depreciation but not in General ledger.

System C01/100, Company cod 3806, Asset No 30000708, COD-MIN

entry.title: Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages
entry.content: "Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages" while running the S_ALR_87013542 (Project System) report. For the Post Goods Issue posting, we are using movement type 281 Q with the cost center assigned as the account assignment object. Could this issue be related to the report output type, or is there another possible cause?  As requested by the business, could you confirm whether it is possible to display line items at the Cost Center level?

entry.title: Partnerbanktyp aus F-47 nicht im F110 Echtlauf
entry.content: Ich habe eine Buchung in der Transaktion F-47 erfasst, bei der der Partnerbanktyp gepflegt wurde, aber dieser wird nicht an die Transaktion F110 im Echtlauf übergeben. Ich möchte wissen, warum der Partnerbanktyp nicht automatisch in den Zahlungsbeleg übernommen wird und welche Einstellungen oder Anpassungen erforderlich sind, um dieses Problem zu beheben. Im F110 Vorschlagslauf im Protokoll ist der Partnerbanktyp richtig aufgeführt.

entry.title: Asset planed deprecation Issue
entry.content:
Dear Team,

The business posted asset adjustment entries on 31-Dec-2025 for the following three assets:

  • 247000009
  • 247000008
  • 247000000

However, planned depreciation is being generated only for Asset 247000009. For the other two assets (247000008 and 247000000), planned depreciation is not being displayed

entry.title: Planed Deprecation Issue
entry.content: Asset planed Deprecation

entry.title: Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages
entry.content: "Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages" while running the S_ALR_87013542 (Project System) report. For the Post Goods Issue posting, we are using movement type 281 Q with the cost center assigned as the account assignment object. Could this issue be related to the report output type, or is there another possible cause?  As requested by the business, could you confirm whether it is possible to display line items at the Cost Center level?

entry.title: Transaction code F.61, decimal notation PDF form
entry.content: User is running Correspondence via transaction codes FB12, Correspondence SAP19 Customer Invoice, and F.61 for Trigger correspondence. User is running for Company code US02 (country US), decimal notation in SU3 xxx,xxx.00. however the correspondence for Customer from Porto Rico is xxx.xxx,00. We are trying to debug and trace the behavior to find the tables and configuration related the decimal notation for Form PDF. We can see that the decimal notation per country is in table T005X and T005 however we cannot find this table in trace nor debug. Which table the program is considering for this decimal notation?  Kindly share your analysis related.

entry.title: Asset not fully depreciating with Dep to day approach in SAp
entry.content: We created Dep Keys by selecting the 'Deo to day' checkbox for both straightline and Multi level percent Dep Key. But the Assets the Assets are not fully depreciated after the useful life. Please check. Allow us to create an SAP incident as we already asked in SAP Community but no response. Thanks

entry.title: Customer Number Not Displayed for Certain Documents in FBL5N – Customer Line-Item Display
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

We are experiencing an issue in Transaction FBL5N (Customer Line Item Display) where the Customer Number field is not populated for a few accounting documents, although the documents are displayed under the respective customer account.

Observed Behavior

  • In FBL5N output, some line items show a blank Customer Number field.
  • Other line items for the same customer display the Customer Number correctly.
  • As shown in the attached file, customer numbers such as 902500 and 901400 are displayed for some records, while several other records belonging to the same customer appear with a blank Customer Number field.

entry.title: FBL1N mass block
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to apply Payment block through FBL1N mass feature, but due to baseline date is not editable system is not allowing it.

 

Please find attached Document for detailed steps.

entry.title: Keine Beschreibungstexte in Transaktion KOH3
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

In der Transaktion KOH3 - Anzeige der Arbeitsgruppen - werden 99% der vorhandenen Beschreibungstexte nicht angezeigt.
Wenn ich mir den gleiche Inhalt über die Transaktion KOH2 anzeigen lasse,  werden diese wunderbar dargestellt.

Hat jemand das gleich Problem und konnte es bereits lösen?

Vielen Dank,
Bastian

entry.title: CJ88 getting error- Not possible to post down payment clearing. There are no down payments
entry.content: Issue while doing CJ88 getting error- Not possible to post down payment clearing. There are no down payments

entry.title: GGB1 substitution not getting triggered during AS02
entry.content: The substitution rule for evaluation group is working fine in AS01 for asset master creation. But the same rule is not working for AS02 in case of change asset.

entry.title: FBL1N - Order Number selection criterion no longer filters vendor line items in S/4HANA
entry.content:
System:
- SAP S/4HANA
- Reference system: SAP ECC

Issue Description:
In transaction FBL1N, the selection field "Order Number" (N° ordre - field BKPF-LOTKZ or display structure  RFPOSXEXT-U_LOTKZ ) no longer appears to be taken into account in the S/4HANA environments.

When an Order Number is entered in the selection criteria, the report returns vendor line items that do not correspond to the entered Order Number. The output is therefore not filtered according to this criterion.

Expected Result:
The report should only display line items associated with the entered Order Number, as observed in the SAP ECC system.

Actual Result:
The report ignores the Order Number criterion and returns entries that are not restricted to the specified Order Number.

Comparison with ECC:
Using the same selection criteria on the SAP ECC system, the filtering is correctly applied and only the expected line items are returned.

Business Impact:
Users can no longer reliably analyze vendor open/cleared items based on Order Number. This impacts operational controls a

entry.title: Update Processor through FIN_WF_AGENT BADI for Verify General Journal Entries Workflow
entry.content:
Hi Community Members,

I have implemented the BADI - FIN_WF_AGENT using the Custom Logic FIORI app in order to update the processor for Verify General Journal Entries workflow/

My requirement is to be able to dynamically assign processors for Verify General JE Workflow requests. I have a CBO where the list of approvers are maintained for each of the submitter (here submitter is the one who creates the JE using the Verify General JE FIORI app).

In the Manage Workflow for Verify General JE, we have added a deadline option which trigger after 1 minute of Step. And the initial recipient is another user (of type BP employee). This user (let's say USER_APRV) is also listed in the Manage Teams & Responsibilities FIORI app.

Now, when a new request is raised, initially the processor is set as USER_APRV. However, as the deadline callback class is triggered after 1 minute, the BADI implementation is also triggered and the processor gets updated. Inside the BADI the "old_agent" is replaced by the "new_agent".  Currently, the "new_agent" value is hard-coded. However, the requirement is that the "new_agent" should be determined by selecting the appropriate approver from the designated CBO based on the submitter of the request.

In the ABAP call stack, I can see that the method "if_swf_flex_ifs_run_appl_step~on_deadline_action_callback" of the class "CL_FDC_ACCDOC_VER_FLEX_RUN_APP" is being called and it contains the  workflow task id ("IV_TASK_WI_ID") as an importing parameter to the class. This task id can be used to query the CDS C_GLJRNLENTRYTOBEVERIFIED  to get the Journal entry detail along with the submitter.

Here comes the issue! Since the task id is an importing parameter and local to the class, I cannot read it using a dirty assignment technique. Also, I have using several other class-methods / Function modules to get the work-item id from the stack or the memory but nothing was successful.

If anyone has had such a requirement and was able to achieve this, it would be really helpful for me if you can share your insights.

Thank you,
Sayak

SAP Business Workflow  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Finance

entry.title: GL Account name language issue in FBL1N line item
entry.content: Login SAP Production system in Chinese, go to FBL1N vendor line item, enter vendor 1300, company code 1000, other parameters keep default values and execute F8, you can see the name of GL account 2202010100 is English name instead of Chinese name, because we maintained GL account master name both in Chinese and English, suppose it should display English name of account,  high appreciated if someone tell me the reason why.

entry.title: Make Optional Check number field for F-36 transaction
entry.content: We want to make the check number field as optional for f-36 transaction . we have even checked note no 3531338  system says it cannot be implemented.
